# llms.txt — Web3 bounty skill hub

## Canonical skill

- Path: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/SKILL.md`
- Supporting templates: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/references/*.md`

## Human docs

- Repository overview: `README.md`
- Worked examples: `examples/`
- Methodology links: `research/SOURCES.md`

## Install hint for agents

Copy `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report` into a consuming repo at `.cursor/skills/web3-bounty-poc-report`.
